provenance.note: Deterministic mock output for pipeline testing; not a verified public accession.

claim_ceiling.reason: The executable plan remains at candidate association and co-expression level.

normalized_research_question: Find secreted or surface molecules in type 2 diabetes adipose tissue that are associated with inflammatory gene upregulation.
answerable_scope: Rank candidate secreted or surface molecules associated with inflammatory activation in T2D adipose tissue.
Use fallback single-cell evidence to localize candidate expression by cell type.
Summarize which claims remain candidate-level only.
unanswerable_scope: Causal driver status for insulin resistance or inflammation.
Experimentally confirmed secretion or true extracellular accessibility.

evidence_dag.rationale: Primary bulk dataset supports tissue-level association screening.
Fallback single-cell dataset supports localization review.
Primary dataset feeds association scoring and ranking.
Candidate ranking is filtered by annotation after association scoring.
Fallback localization uses the single-cell dataset only.
Final reporting must honor the claim ceiling from upstream agents.

task_dag.name: dataset intake and metadata audit
task_dag.purpose: Confirm the selected mock datasets match disease, tissue, and metadata expectations.
acceptance_criteria: Disease labels and adipose tissue scope are present.
Fallback dataset availability is documented.
task_dag.failure_condition: Required phenotype or tissue metadata are missing.

task_dag.name: expression matrix QC
task_dag.purpose: Apply deterministic QC to the primary bulk expression matrix.
acceptance_criteria: Primary matrix passes basic completeness checks.
Case and control samples remain represented after QC.
task_dag.failure_condition: QC removes the disease or control branch entirely.

task_dag.name: inflammatory gene program scoring
task_dag.purpose: Score inflammatory activation in the QC-filtered bulk dataset.
acceptance_criteria: Every retained sample receives a program score.
Scoring remains tied to the predefined inflammatory gene set.
task_dag.failure_condition: Program scores cannot be computed consistently for retained samples.

task_dag.name: molecule-program association test
task_dag.purpose: Rank candidate molecules by association with inflammatory activation.
acceptance_criteria: Candidate association table records direction and relative strength.
Results remain framed as association or co-expression only.
task_dag.failure_condition: No candidate association table can be produced from the selected data.

task_dag.name: surface or secretome annotation
task_dag.purpose: Apply candidate-level surface or secretome annotation filters.
acceptance_criteria: Annotated candidates retain their original association evidence.
Annotation status is preserved as candidate-level metadata.

task_dag.name: candidate ranking
task_dag.purpose: Produce a conservative ranked list of candidate molecules.
acceptance_criteria: Ranking preserves association-level language.
Candidates outside the secreted or surface filter are excluded.
task_dag.failure_condition: No candidates remain after annotation filtering.

task_dag.name: fallback cell-type localization
task_dag.purpose: Review whether ranked candidates localize to interpretable adipose cell populations.
acceptance_criteria: Localization notes keep the fallback nature explicit.
No cell-type-specific causal claim is introduced.
task_dag.failure_condition: Fallback single-cell metadata are insufficient for localization review.

task_dag.name: evidence summary and report drafting
task_dag.purpose: Compile the final report with claim boundaries, caveats, and next steps.
acceptance_criteria: Report states answerable and unanswerable scope.
Report repeats allowed and forbidden claims explicitly.
task_dag.failure_condition: The report attempts to exceed the claim ceiling.

fallback_paths: If the fallback single-cell dataset lacks disease labels, use it for localization only and keep ranking anchored to bulk tissue association.
If adipose depot metadata are incomplete, report combined adipose scope and preserve the ambiguity.
stop_conditions: Stop if only rejected datasets remain after feasibility review.
Stop if a selected method contract is not in the ready set.
Stop if any downstream conclusion would require a causal claim upgrade.

allowed_claims: Candidate secreted or surface molecules associated with inflammatory activation in type 2 diabetes adipose tissue.
forbidden_claims: Experimentally confirmed secreted or surface proteins.
caveats: Primary evidence is tissue-level association only.
Fallback localization does not resolve causality.

codex_task_packets.name: dataset intake and metadata audit
codex_task_packets.purpose: Confirm the selected mock datasets match disease, tissue, and metadata expectations.
acceptance_criteria: Disease labels and adipose tissue scope are present.
Fallback dataset availability is documented.
codex_task_packets.failure_condition: Required phenotype or tissue metadata are missing.
codex_task_packets.notes: Gate the run before any analysis step.

codex_task_packets.name: expression matrix QC
codex_task_packets.purpose: Apply deterministic QC to the primary bulk expression matrix.
acceptance_criteria: Primary matrix passes basic completeness checks.
Case and control samples remain represented after QC.
codex_task_packets.failure_condition: QC removes the disease or control branch entirely.

codex_task_packets.name: inflammatory gene program scoring
codex_task_packets.purpose: Score inflammatory activation in the QC-filtered bulk dataset.
acceptance_criteria: Every retained sample receives a program score.
Scoring remains tied to the predefined inflammatory gene set.
codex_task_packets.failure_condition: Program scores cannot be computed consistently for retained samples.

codex_task_packets.name: molecule-program association test
codex_task_packets.purpose: Rank candidate molecules by association with inflammatory activation.
acceptance_criteria: Candidate association table records direction and relative strength.
Results remain framed as association or co-expression only.
codex_task_packets.failure_condition: No candidate association table can be produced from the selected data.
codex_task_packets.notes: Do not reinterpret association as mechanism.

codex_task_packets.name: surface or secretome annotation
codex_task_packets.purpose: Apply candidate-level surface or secretome annotation filters.
acceptance_criteria: Annotated candidates retain their original association evidence.
Annotation status is preserved as candidate-level metadata.
codex_task_packets.notes: Annotation does not prove true accessibility.

codex_task_packets.name: candidate ranking
codex_task_packets.purpose: Produce a conservative ranked list of candidate molecules.
acceptance_criteria: Ranking preserves association-level language.
Candidates outside the secreted or surface filter are excluded.
codex_task_packets.failure_condition: No candidates remain after annotation filtering.
codex_task_packets.notes: Ranking is the primary answerable deliverable.

codex_task_packets.name: fallback cell-type localization
codex_task_packets.purpose: Review whether ranked candidates localize to interpretable adipose cell populations.
acceptance_criteria: Localization notes keep the fallback nature explicit.
No cell-type-specific causal claim is introduced.
codex_task_packets.failure_condition: Fallback single-cell metadata are insufficient for localization review.
codex_task_packets.notes: This is optional support, not a required ranking input.

codex_task_packets.name: evidence summary and report drafting
codex_task_packets.purpose: Compile the final report with claim boundaries, caveats, and next steps.
acceptance_criteria: Report states answerable and unanswerable scope.
Report repeats allowed and forbidden claims explicitly.
codex_task_packets.failure_condition: The report attempts to exceed the claim ceiling.
codex_task_packets.notes: The final report remains mock-only and non-causal.
